summary: Frontend-only polish iteration verified. Sidebar 'Dashboard' rename, H1 rename, AI mic button voice input, and full page-render regression all pass. Palette on sidebar is compliant. Found leftover 'Pulse' copy and non-compliant colors (purple/cyan/green) on Dashboard.jsx (kindColor + accuracy tile).

issues: kindColor uses #8B5CF6 (purple) for rule_created and #06B6D4 (cyan) for coa_generated — violates palette restriction (no purples/cyans). Visible on 'Rules Created' tile background tint in AI activity list.
AI accuracy tile uses #22C55E (green-500) instead of emerald #10B981 — mild deviation from stated palette.
Line 43 empty-state string still says: 'Select a company to view your Pulse.' — leftover from rename.
Activity item with type 'webhook_sync' has no entry in kindLabel/kindIcon maps — renders raw string 'webhook_sync' with default Sparkles icon. Cosmetic but noticeable.

action_items: In frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx: replace kindColor.rule_created (#8B5CF6) and kindColor.coa_generated (#06B6D4) with palette-compliant colors (e.g., #6366F1 or #3B82F6).
Change AI accuracy tile color from #22C55E to #10B981 for palette consistency.
Update 'Select a company to view your Pulse.' → 'Select a company to view your Dashboard.'
Add kindLabel/kindIcon entries for 'webhook_sync' or filter unknown types.
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.jsx, Reports.jsx, SuperadminDash.jsx palette changes are clean and compliant.

AiPanel.jsx SpeechRecognition setup is robust: feature-detects window.SpeechRecognition||webkitSpeechRecognition, guards start/stop with try/catch, toasts on unsupported browsers, resets listening state on error/end. Mic button data-testid='ai-chat-mic' present. No JS errors on click in headless Chromium.
Dashboard.jsx retains legacy palette values that contradict the polish spec — needs a small follow-up commit.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 UI polish verified. Only Dashboard.jsx has residual non-palette colors and one 'Pulse' string. Backend untouched; skip backend re-test unless changed. AI mic click confirmed non-crashing; verified 'Listening…' indicator renders (see screenshot dashboard.png).
